title: gravesia magnifolia
intro: Gravesia magnifolia, also known as Grave's plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihelmintic properties. The health benefits of Gravesia magnifolia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. Gravesia magnifolia is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be made into a tincture or ointment for topical application.
